note: The results table reports only a single 'Global warming potential' indicator (no separate GWP-fossil/biogenic/GHG breakdown). A1-A3 given in separate columns: A1=5.86E-01, A2=6.09E-02, A3=3.26E-01, summed to 0.9729 kg CO2 eq. per declared unit (1 tyre driven 1,000 km). Total all-stages GWP was 2.09E+01.
